productName: .5g Isolated Pre-Rolled Cones 6pk - Isolated Blue Dream Pre-Rolled Cones - 3g
description: Ready-to-spark hybrid infused pre-roll of Blue Dream, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of berry, blueberry, and sweet, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
